title: OrchestratorAgentOutput
description: Output schema for the Orchestrator Agent. Returned by the Command Execution flow (Flow 8) in response to natural language commands from the command bar.

response_text.description: Plain text response to show the user. Natural, conversational English. No markdown formatting.

card_links.description: Links to cards referenced in the response. The PCF component renders these as clickable navigation links. Maximum 5 per response.

card_id.description: Dataverse row ID (GUID) of the referenced AssistantCard.

label.description: Short label for the link displayed in the response panel.

side_effects.description: Actions taken that modified data. The Canvas app uses this to trigger a Refresh call.

description.description: Human-readable description of what was done.
